languages.text: "Если такова ваша воля. Вы сделали достаточно, чтобы заслужить право называться другом династии фон Валанциус. А друзьям принято идти навстречу в подобных вопросах."

traits.locale_text: "Если такова ваша воля. Вы сделали достаточно, чтобы заслужить право называться другом династии фон Валанциус. А друзьям принято идти навстречу в подобных вопросах."

languages.text: "If that is your will. By your actions, you have earned the right to be called a friend of the von Valancius dynasty. And it is customary for friends to be accommodating in such matters."
languages.original_text: "Если такова ваша воля. Вы сделали достаточно, чтобы заслужить право называться другом династии фон Валанциус. А друзьям принято идти навстречу в подобных вопросах."

traits.locale_text: "If that is your will. By your actions, you have earned the right to be called a friend of the von Valancius dynasty. And it is customary for friends to be accommodating in such matters."
"If that is your will. By your actions, you have earned the right to be called a friend of the von Valancius dynasty. And it is customary for friends to be accommodating in such matters."
"If that is your will. By your actions, you have earned the right to be called a friend of the von Valancius dynasty. And it is customary for friends to be accommodating in such matters."

languages.text: “那就依你的意思吧。你已经用行动证明自己是冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的朋友。而朋友在这些事上理应行个方便。”
languages.original_text: "If that is your will. By your actions, you have earned the right to be called a friend of the von Valancius dynasty. And it is customary for friends to be accommodating in such matters."

traits.locale_text: “那就依你的意思吧。你已经用行动证明自己是冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的朋友。而朋友在这些事上理应行个方便。”

languages.text: « Comme vous voudrez. Par vos actions, vous avez gagné le droit d'intégrer le cercle restreint des amis de la dynastie von Valancius. Et entre amis, il est de coutume de se montrer conciliants. »
languages.original_text: "If that is your will. By your actions, you have earned the right to be called a friend of the von Valancius dynasty. And it is customary for friends to be accommodating in such matters."

traits.locale_text: « Comme vous voudrez. Par vos actions, vous avez gagné le droit d'intégrer le cercle restreint des amis de la dynastie von Valancius. Et entre amis, il est de coutume de se montrer conciliants. »

languages.text: "İsteğiniz buysa müsaade sizindir. Alnınızın akıyla, von Valancius hanedanının dostu olarak bilinmeyi hak ettiniz. Dostların da bu tür konularda anlayış göstermesi âdettendir."
languages.original_text: "If that is your will. By your actions, you have earned the right to be called a friend of the von Valancius dynasty. And it is customary for friends to be accommodating in such matters."

traits.locale_text: "İsteğiniz buysa müsaade sizindir. Alnınızın akıyla, von Valancius hanedanının dostu olarak bilinmeyi hak ettiniz. Dostların da bu tür konularda anlayış göstermesi âdettendir."

languages.text: «Si esa es su voluntad. Sus actos le han otorgado el derecho de hacerse llamar amig{mf|o|a} de la dinastía von Valancius, y es tradicional que los amigos concedan estos favores».
languages.original_text: "If that is your will. By your actions, you have earned the right to be called a friend of the von Valancius dynasty. And it is customary for friends to be accommodating in such matters."

traits.locale_text: «Si esa es su voluntad. Sus actos le han otorgado el derecho de hacerse llamar amig{mf|o|a} de la dinastía von Valancius, y es tradicional que los amigos concedan estos favores».

languages.text: "Wenn das Euer Wille ist. Durch Eure Taten habt Ihr Euch das Recht verdient, Euch {mf|Freund|Freundin} der Dynastie derer von Valancius zu nennen. Und es ist üblich, dass sich Freunde in solchen Angelegenheiten unterstützen."
languages.original_text: "If that is your will. By your actions, you have earned the right to be called a friend of the von Valancius dynasty. And it is customary for friends to be accommodating in such matters."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn das Euer Wille ist. Durch Eure Taten habt Ihr Euch das Recht verdient, Euch {mf|Freund|Freundin} der Dynastie derer von Valancius zu nennen. Und es ist üblich, dass sich Freunde in solchen Angelegenheiten unterstützen."

languages.text: 「そうであれば、ご意向に従います。貴殿の行動によって、フォン・ヴァランキウス家の友人と呼ばれる権利を勝ち取られました。友人同士であれば、このようなことは融通が利くものです」
languages.original_text: "If that is your will. By your actions, you have earned the right to be called a friend of the von Valancius dynasty. And it is customary for friends to be accommodating in such matters."

traits.locale_text: 「そうであれば、ご意向に従います。貴殿の行動によって、フォン・ヴァランキウス家の友人と呼ばれる権利を勝ち取られました。友人同士であれば、このようなことは融通が利くものです」
